headline: DALL-E 2, DALL-E 3, and Realtime API Beta Removed from OpenAI API
raw_snippet: OpenAI removed DALL-E 2 and DALL-E 3 model snapshots from the API on May 12, completing a deprecation announced November 2025. Developers are directed to use gpt-image-2, gpt-image-1, or gpt-image-1-mini. The Realtime API Beta was also removed the same day, with developers urged to migrate to the released Realtime API.
curator_notes: Platform lifecycle event. DALL-E image models fully retired from API. Consolidation onto newer architecture.
verification_notes: URL returned 403 — likely bot protection, manual verification recommended
post_check_reason: Staleness signals: Origin date reference: 'announced november'
